subcodes.first_line: O thou who art turned towards the Kingdom of Abhá! In this moment when the sweet fragrance of divine love perfumeth the senses of them that yearn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت ابهی در این حین که بوی خوش حب الهی مشام مشتاقان را معطر دارد
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God
